pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies the page titled 'Portfolio'.
Task description directly specifies the page titled 'Journal'.
Task description directly specifies these exact phrases to be included in the 'Portfolio' page content.
Task description directly specifies these exact phrases to be included in the 'Journal' page content.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated WordPress pages based on direct instructions in the task description. The expected titles are exactly 'Portfolio' and 'Journal'. The Portfolio page must contain the exact phrases 'Sarah Chen Photography', 'Wedding Photography', and 'Portland'. The Journal page must contain the exact phrases 'behind-the-scenes stories' and 'photography tips'. These details are confirmed to accurately reflect the explicitly required content in the task description.
